scene_description: The image shows a narrow asphalt road in the foreground, gray in color and smooth. A light-colored (off-white) patch is visible on the left side of the road, near the bottom left. To the left of the road (left foreground), dense green and brown vegetation (bushes and shrubs) extends along the road's edge, with some dry, brownish foliage. To the right of the road (right foreground), a grassy area with mixed green and dry (brown) vegetation— including tall, dry grasses—slopes upward. The road extends into the middle ground, curving slightly to the right, with no visible lane markings. On both sides of the road in the middle ground, the vegetation continues: dense green shrubs to the left and a grassy area with dry vegetation to the right. In the background, the road is bordered by rolling hills covered in dense, low-lying green vegetation (bushes and shrubs). The sky above is clear and bright blue, with the sun shining brightly on the right side of the image, causing a visible glare. No text, signs, infrastructure, vehicles, buildings, or road markings (beyond the light patch) are present.
